records.analysis: The image is a detailed mind map diagram titled 'Chap7 I/O系统' (Chapter 7 I/O System), visually organizing the key concepts and structure of an I/O system in computer architecture. The layout is radial, with the central node labeled 'Chap7 I/O系统' in a dark blue box, from which several main branches extend outward. Each branch represents a major topic, such as 'I/O系统基本概念' (Basic Concepts of I/O System), 'I/O设备' (I/O Devices), 'I/O接口' (I/O Interfaces), 'I/O端口' (I/O Ports), 'I/O控制器' (I/O Controllers), 'I/O通道' (I/O Channels), and 'I/O方式' (I/O Methods). Sub-branches further break down these topics into detailed subtopics, such as device classification, interface functions, port types, controller structure, and data transfer methods (programmed I/O, interrupt-driven I/O, DMA). The mind map includes small embedded diagrams, tables, and flowcharts illustrating technical details like data paths, interface types, and controller logic. The color scheme uses yellow for the left-side branches and red for the right-side branches, with text in black or dark gray. The background is white, and the overall visual style is clean and schematic, aiding in knowledge organization and retrieval. No people are present; all elements are textual or diagrammatic. The mind map directly reflects and organizes the surrounding textual context, visually summarizing the chapter's structure and key points.
